open.label: Open command palette
open.description: Search actions and destinations from anywhere in the app.

charge.label: Charge
charge.description: Open the payment modal for the active cart.

productSearch.label: Search product
productSearch.description: Open the product search dialog inside the active sale.

focusProduct.label: Focus product input
focusProduct.description: Jump the cursor to the barcode / search input on the sales page.

focusQuantity.label: Focus quantity
focusQuantity.description: Jump the cursor to the quantity field of the selected cart row.

focusDiscount.label: Focus discount
focusDiscount.description: Jump the cursor to the discount field of the selected cart row.

focusUnit.label: Focus unit selector
focusUnit.description: Jump the cursor to the unit selector inside the product search dialog.

suspend.label: Suspend cart
suspend.description: Park the active cart so you can start a new sale.

toggleSuspended.label: Toggle suspended panel
toggleSuspended.description: Show or hide the panel that lists suspended carts.

reprint.label: Reprint receipt
reprint.description: Reprint the receipt of the selected history row.

removeItem.label: Remove cart item
removeItem.description: Drop the selected line from the active cart.

undo.label: Undo last cart action
undo.description: Revert the most recent change to the active cart (add, quantity, discount, remove).
